steps: Define $Z_n = \ker d_n \subseteq C_n$ and $B_n = \operatorname{im} d_{n+1} \subseteq C_n$. We have $H_n = Z_n/B_n$, so $\beta_n = \operatorname{rank} Z_n - \operatorname{rank} B_n$.
Also, $\operatorname{rank} C_n = c_n = \operatorname{rank} Z_n + \operatorname{rank}(\operatorname{im} d_n) = \operatorname{rank} Z_n + \operatorname{rank} B_{n-1}$.
Summing over all $n$: $\sum_n (-1)^n c_n = \sum_n (-1)^n \operatorname{rank} Z_n + \sum_n (-1)^n \operatorname{rank} B_{n-1}$.
Re-index the second sum: $\sum_n (-1)^n \operatorname{rank} B_{n-1} = \sum_n (-1)^{n+1} \operatorname{rank} B_n$.
